paragraph: Saw your recent push on AI-driven support [ExampleFin expands AI](https://examplefin.com/blog/ai-support). We help consumer fintechs hit high deflection on tier-1 tickets. Worth a 20-minute conversation?
Hi, I work in support automation and we sell AI agents. Let me know if you want to learn more.

ExampleNotes' recent doubling of headcount and enterprise push [ExampleNotes scales](https://examplenotes.com/news/scale) makes deflection a real lever. We helped a similar mid-market SaaS get to 80% AI-handled tickets and would love to compare notes.
ExampleFleet's IoT platform creates support volume that scales linearly with hardware deployments. Voice + chat agents are tuned for exactly that pattern.
Saw [ExampleHR's recent push on global payroll](https://examplehr.com/news/global). The complexity there is exactly what AI deflection helps with. Glad to share the playbook from a similar rollout.
